rationale: Educ. Code §43.018 governs securities lending mechanics for the permanent school fund. It does not reference homestead exemptions, property tax appraisals, or Tax Code §11.13. No direct conflict exists.
quote: The State Board of Education may contract with a commercial bank to serve both as a custodian of securities in which the state permanent school funds are invested and to lend those securities
_note: No direct or indirect textual conflict. The proposed homestead exemption increase affects property tax revenue but this statute addresses securities lending procedures only.
